bead.title: feat: implement Confluent-compatible schema registry endpoints
bead.description: CONTRACT-006 §Schema registry REST endpoints requires Confluent-compatible REST API served by axon-registry. Endpoints: GET /subjects, POST /subjects/{subject}/versions, GET /subjects/{subject}/versions/{version}, GET /schemas/ids/{id}, PUT /config, POST /compatibility/subjects/{subject}/versions/{version}. Schemas served as JSON Schema 2020-12 (schemaType: 'JSON'). Global schema ID derived from (collection_id, version) packed as integer. Compatibility modes map to FEAT-017 classification. Blocker: axon-registry crate does not yet exist; axon-schema holds schema_versions but no HTTP facade.
